# /AOXD/wDe6j/h9H/1R3/y4f8A73V+GNFAH7nf8Po/+qO/+XD/APe6j/h9H/1R3/y4f/vdX4Y0UAfud/w

## Context
From document: Apparently I'm not the first person who thought you were using them… — chunk 11532 (chunk 11532/11534)

## Content
"/><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>I'm at a point where I don't even know that your mom is living at your apartment at all (she was at her brother’s for months up until the week my lease ends…convenient), if she is sick now or was ever sick, or frankly, if she even exists in this realm. </div>
